phrases.text_local: Qual o caminho mais rápido a pé para a Loja de livros e réplicas?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo AH PEH PUH-ruh AH LAW-zhuh DIH LEEV-roosh EH REHP-lee-kuhsh?

likely_response.local: O caminho mais rápido é indicado pelo rececionista da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo EH een-dee-KAH-doo PEH-loo reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The fastest route is indicated by the entrance receptionist.

responses.english: The fastest route is indicated by the entrance receptionist.
responses.phonetic: AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo EH een-dee-KAH-doo PEH-loo reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: O caminho mais rápido é indicado pelo rececionista da entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audioguide
phrases.cultural_note: O serviço de audioguias está disponível no balcão de check-in.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pick it up at the reception.

responses.english: You can pick it up at the reception.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audioguide
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo leh-vahn-TAH-ree oo (link) ow-jee-oh-GEE-ah dah vee-ZEE-tah
phrases.cultural_note: Audioequipment is centrally distributed to prevent loss and ensure multilingual support matches visitor profiles.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pick it up at the reception.

responses.english: You can pick it up at the reception.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os mosaicos romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Roman antiquities are grouped chronologically; staff direct visitors to dedicated wings for historical context and floor preservation.

likely_response.local: Vá à Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: VAH AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Roman Mosaics Room.

responses.english: Go to the Roman Mosaics Room.
responses.phonetic: VAH AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.french: Vá à Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman Mosaic Room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese museums prioritize efficient visitor flow; staff give concise, precise directions to preserve artifact zones.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um monitor de sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH SAH-luh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um monitor de sala.

phrases.text_local: Onde localizo o claustro renascentista do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih loo-kuh-LEE-zoo AW KLOWSHT-roo reh-nuh-sayng-TEESH-tuh DOO moo-ZEHOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Architectural cloisters serve as central navigation points; staff provide brief landmarks to preserve the quiet atmosphere.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se ao balcão de informações ou pergunte a um funcionário da receção.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH reh-sih-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the information desk or ask a reception staff member.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the information desk or ask a reception staff member.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH reh-sih-SOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, dirija-se ao balcão de informações ou pergunte a um funcionário da receção.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de livros e réplicas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH LEEV-roosh EH REHP-lee-kuhsh?

likely_response.local: Pode obter a localização exata junto do funcionário da bilheteira ou do rececionista da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih awb-TEHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh ZHOONNG-too DOO foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW DOO reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can get the exact location from the ticket office staff or the receptionist at the entrance.

responses.english: You can get the exact location from the ticket office staff or the receptionist at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih awb-TEHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh ZHOONNG-too DOO foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW DOO reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Pode obter a localização exata junto do funcionário da bilheteira ou do rececionista da entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde devo validar o meu bilhete de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation is mandatory at Portuguese cultural sites to track attendance and comply with local heritage regulations.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o bilhete.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office to validate your ticket.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office to validate your ticket.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o bilhete.

phrases.text_local: Qual o caminho para ver a coleção egípcia?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh VEHR AH koo-lih-SOWN eh-ZHEEPS-yuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Specialized artifacts are housed in controlled corridors; direct navigation prevents crowding and maintains security protocols.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção para a Coleção Egípcia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN eh-ZHEEPS-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at reception for the Egyptian Collection.

responses.english: Ask at reception for the Egyptian Collection.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN PUH-ruh AH koo-lih-SOWN eh-ZHEEPS-yuh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção para a Coleção Egípcia.

phrases.cultural_note: A Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos é uma das principais atracções do museu.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Roman Mosaics Room.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Roman Mosaics Room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Sala dos Mosaicos Romanos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Egyptian Collection is
phrases.cultural_note: The Egyptian Collection is a highlight; staff will point you directly.

likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, to the left.

responses.english: On the first floor, to the left.
